source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Sculptural humanist English product UI with Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body text, labels, numerals, dense dashboard tables, and compact Japanese workflows.
layout: Precise 8px dashboard grids, shield-frond texture accents, compact command/search workflows, structured navigation, 8px cards and controls, measured spacing, and restrained dimensional shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent staghorn fern shield motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a staghorn fern shield motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: one sculptural staghorn fern shield with overlapping rounded basal shield fronds, sage green to olive fern surface, subtle cork-brown dry rim patches, deep shadow folds, a few young antler frond tips emerging from the shield, accurate tropical epiphyte botanical form, tactile waxy and papery fern texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the subject; compact vertical organic shield silhouette suitable as a design-system motif.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural sage green, cork brown, and shadow neutral detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no pot, no wall mount, no tree branch, no landscape, no decorative background, no second plant, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Staghorn Fern light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Staghorn Fern", derived from the staghorn fern shield motif just created. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible sculptural dashboard system.
Reference motif: sculptural staghorn fern shield, overlapping rounded basal shield fronds, sage green to olive fern surface, cork-brown dry rim patches, deep shadow folds, young antler frond tips, tropical tree epiphyte depth, tactile waxy and papery fern texture.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 source artwork, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid, plenty of whitespace between sections.
Required visible sections: Morphous Staghorn Fern, Staghorn Fern Shield, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: use only motif-derived colors: sage green fern shield, moss olive, young frond green, cork brown, dry shield tan, fern shadow charcoal, tropical-tree depth green, misty lichen highlight, pale spore neutral, and restrained shadow neutrals. Avoid unrelated color families.
Typography: English product UI guidance with Japanese typography guidance; use a sculptural humanist Latin sans and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, numerals, compact dashboards, and dense table workflows. Include short Japanese labels such as 検索, 分析, 状態, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, data table, command palette, search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, component density notes.
Style: premium sculptural dashboard product design system, pale spore-neutral surfaces, sage primary actions, cork-brown focus and structure, shadow-neutral text, tropical-tree depth in navigation, subtle shield-frond texture, restrained dimensional shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radius.
Text: short readable UI labels only; make section titles large enough for gallery previews.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Staghorn Fern", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Staghorn Fern dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Staghorn Fern". It must feel like the same sculptural dashboard system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the staghorn fern shield motif.
Reference motif: sculptural staghorn fern shield, overlapping rounded basal shield fronds, sage green and olive fern surface, cork-brown dry rim patches, deep shadow folds, young antler frond tips, tropical tree epiphyte depth, tactile waxy and papery fern texture.
Reference light-board system details to preserve: sage primary controls, cork-brown focus and structure, pale spore neutral surfaces, shadow-neutral text, tropical-tree depth navigation, shield-frond texture, precise dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, English and Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 source artwork, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid, plenty of whitespace between sections.
Required visible sections: Morphous Staghorn Fern, Dark Mode, Staghorn Fern Shield, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: use only motif-derived colors: dark tropical-tree canopy green, fern shadow charcoal, deep moss, sage green, cork brown, dry shield tan, pale spore text, lichen muted highlight, and restrained shadow neutrals. Avoid unrelated color families.
Typography: English product UI guidance with Japanese typography guidance; use a sculptural humanist Latin sans and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, numerals, compact dashboards, and dense table workflows. Include short Japanese labels such as 検索, 分析, 状態, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, data table, command palette, search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, component density notes.
Visual details: dark background derived from fern shadow charcoal and tropical-tree depth, elevated panels in deep moss and warm charcoal, pale spore foreground text, sage primary actions, cork-brown focus rings, lichen success/status accents, subtle shield-frond texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, all cards and controls use 8px radius.
Text: short readable UI labels only; make section titles large enough for gallery previews.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Staghorn Fern", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
